_comment: ledType=6 (NEO_RGB) is INTENTIONAL — this panel's LED part ships in native RGB byte order, NOT the WS2812B GRB default (82). Confirmed visually after a deploy session showed red/green swap (commit aa382f93f8). orientation=3 = HORIZONTAL_ZIGZAG: a single strip snaked L→R / R→L across rows (hand-wired panel). buttonPin=0 (DISABLED 2026-05-20): the physical generator-cycle button on D1 was firing ghost presses (random generator changes); debounce (b190 §1.4) did not stop them, so the button is disabled entirely by setting buttonPin=0.
